changelog:
THE IRON BUNKER V4.1 (Part 2):
- [SECURITY] Strict SSL Enforcement: All endpoints, including UI and API P2P receivers, now strictly require encrypted HTTPS connections. Unsecured HTTP requests will be automatically redirected or rejected to prevent Man-in-the-Middle (MitM) attacks.
- [SYSTEM] Auto-Versioning & Coordinates: The Public Hologram (index.php) now automatically detects the station's dynamic routing coordinates and current software version.
